headline: General Dynamics gets unexpected War Department win ahead of earnings
summary: Eight months ago, the U.S. Army quietly told General Dynamics (GD) to stop work on a $591 million artillery shell factory in Texas. No public explanation. No timeline for resolution. Just a work stoppage order on a plant that had already opened, and still hadn't produced a single shell. For a ...

headline: GD Stock Gets Attention After New Submarine Program Award
summary: With a promising forward P/E ratio of 17.38, General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) is among the 10 Most Undervalued Defense Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) secured a $196.55 million cost-plus-fixed-fee contract on April 24 to support engineering, technical design, and design transfer activities related to nuclear submarine capabilities and sustainment for foreign military […]
